rationale: Educ. Code §29.917 governs higher education and workforce readiness grant programs. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.917. HIGHER EDUCATION AND WORKFORCE READINESS PROGRAMS.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
